notes: BattleUnit now carries a battle-runtime objectiveResponseRole marker.
BattleResult converts objective response roles into Japanese battle roles, XP bonuses, officer XP, and commendations.
applyBattleResult already writes BattleResult role and commendations into unit battleHistory, so Army Camp inherits the objective-response history without a new save migration.
Mobile QA was intentionally skipped because mobile is outside the current target.
